notes: First bare test brought a crash, so I tried 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=2 %command%' in starting options. Game starts and runs without a problem. Graphical details may be little less than in Windows, but that's a AMD driver issue.
title: Mashinky

notes: Crashed after about 20 minutes. Alt-tab didn't really worked. Otherwise looked correct.
title: Mashinky

notes: Also have the graphical issues mentioned earlier when having the build modus active. Besides that experienced graphical glitches at the bottom part and right side of the screen (blinking black squares). The latter I got rid off by disabling ambient occlusion. I didn't find a solution this far for the glitches during the build phase.
title: Mashinky

notes: Same glitches in build mode as in most other reports. Apart from that it is super playable though. No tweaks needed.
